# Bootstrap-Icons → Lucide mapping

Generated by audit pass for initiative 015. Source: `grep -rohE 'bi-[a-z0-9-]+' app/templates app/static/js`.

| Bootstrap-Icons class       | Lucide icon name      | Notes                                    |
| --------------------------- | --------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `bi-archive`                | `archive`             |                                          |
| `bi-arrow-left`             | `arrow-left`          |                                          |
| `bi-bar-chart`              | `chart-bar`           |                                          |
| `bi-box-arrow-in-right`     | `log-in`              |                                          |
| `bi-box-arrow-right`        | `log-out`             |                                          |
| `bi-check-circle`           | `circle-check`        | Lucide renamed `check-circle` → `circle-check` |
| `bi-check2`                 | `check`               |                                          |
| `bi-check2-square`          | `square-check`        | Lucide renamed `check-square` → `square-check` |
| `bi-chevron-down`           | `chevron-down`        |                                          |
| `bi-chevron-right`          | `chevron-right`       |                                          |
| `bi-chevron-up`             | `chevron-up`          |                                          |
| `bi-collection`             | `folder`              |                                          |
| `bi-download`               | `download`            |                                          |
| `bi-exclamation-triangle`   | `triangle-alert`      | Lucide renamed `alert-triangle` → `triangle-alert` |
| `bi-exclamation-triangle-fill` | `triangle-alert`   | Filled variant collapsed onto outline    |
| `bi-eye`                    | `eye`                 |                                          |
| `bi-file-earmark-pdf`       | `file-text`           | No PDF-specific glyph in Lucide          |
| `bi-file-earmark-text`      | `file-text`           |                                          |
| `bi-filetype-csv`           | `file-spreadsheet`    |                                          |
| `bi-filetype-pdf`           | `file-text`           |                                          |
| `bi-folder2-open`           | `folder-open`         |                                          |
| `bi-funnel`                 | `funnel`              | Lucide does not ship `filter` directly; uses `funnel` (or `sliders-horizontal`) |
| `bi-grip-vertical`          | `grip-vertical`       |                                          |
| `bi-house`                  | `house`               |                                          |
| `bi-inbox`                  | `inbox`               |                                          |
| `bi-info-circle`            | `info`                |                                          |
| `bi-input-cursor-text`      | `text-cursor-input`   |                                          |
| `bi-list`                   | `menu`                | Used as hamburger                        |
| `bi-list-check`             | `list-checks`         |                                          |
| `bi-list-ul`                | `list`                |                                          |
| `bi-mortarboard-fill`       | `graduation-cap`      |                                          |
| `bi-paperclip`              | `paperclip`           |                                          |
| `bi-pencil`                 | `pencil`              |                                          |
| `bi-people`                 | `users`               |                                          |
| `bi-person`                 | `user`                |                                          |
| `bi-person-lines-fill`      | `contact`             |                                          |
| `bi-play-fill`              | `play`                |                                          |
| `bi-plus-lg`                | `plus`                |                                          |
| `bi-plus-square`            | `square-plus`         | Lucide renamed `plus-square` → `square-plus` |
| `bi-search`                 | `search`              |                                          |
| `bi-trash`                  | `trash-2`             |                                          |
| `bi-upload`                 | `upload`              |                                          |
| `bi-x-circle`               | `circle-x`            | Lucide renamed `x-circle` → `circle-x`   |

Total unique Lucide icons to vendor: **39** (after collapsing fill/outline duplicates).
